textByHashes.01a6ae81f4bbbbc66522fb4f238e34384de1d50d: I wouldn't know about that, outerlander.
textByHashes.6f5ba4173549e89e7da72b9096b20d2cca3cc135: How did you hear about that?!?!?
textByHashes.260e837a560c76a681bb7071b315315c25c6bf50: I didn't think anybody knew about that... Well, it is true that in my younger years as a barkeep, I wandered the lands trying various alcoholic delicacies.
textByHashes.dd89a32fae9175db68a6ea234798283c53ff7a8e: Did you ever realise just how many different types of alcohol there are here in Gielinor? Lots!
textByHashes.4f5435c1617f74267586de293cd7c3e21f8be08c: Well, anyway, I used a fusion of various drinks from all around the world to create the greatest cocktail ever made!
textByHashes.8fc52a99eff97053c1fc0159d6f445dacad9aed8: Of course, when my wanderlust was gone, and I returned back to Rellekka to serve as barkeep here, I gave all that up.
textByHashes.fd0bc3cfe10f6c659ce8eb3376a90295e4725ba2: No, I have them all here. Why?
textByHashes.bc629c865f30cf7058091ff0b1551756b5d52eb4: I would rather not; it is a reminder of a life I left behind when I came back.
textByHashes.461be99c2835fda0da1e97470ae1649b95a8d98a: You need this to become a Fremennik, right? Well, you seem okay for an outerlander, it would be a shame to see you fail. You know Askeladden?
textByHashes.d7ae98c793fd5e82b0b3e08203b6075a00fb2da6: He is nothing but a pest. He keeps sneaking in and stealing beer. I shudder to think what he will be like when he has passed his trial of manhood,
textByHashes.27616a4d97d5f482d906fe9a0e020235a7c2415a: and is allowed in here legitimately. If you can get him to sign a contract promising that he will NEVER EVER EVER darken my doorway here again, you get the drink.
textByHashes.b24e79eb48b7ced5574fbc0ef8e1eae471008ca5: Knowing that little horror, he'll probably be willing to in exchange for some cash. You should go ask him yourself though.
textByHashes.b791b67784a4b27638ae651eae214490c21fb317: Well, as I say, you should talk to him about that. Knowing the little runt as I do though He'll probably do it for the cash.
textByHashes.b835063272d43625602fb52f56928a8e19444c88: What?!?! I can't believe you... Let me look at that... Askeladden would NEVER... Gosh. It looks legitimate.
textByHashes.9f996f2d824c68448ee8d014e4f0eaf3079d044e: Here you go, on the house! You have made my life SO much easier! Knowing that little monster won't be bugging me in here all the time anymore!
textByHashes.2dce01f4fd8cd3b924368faada287d20c1f0f82d: That little weasel will have to abide by this written promise that Askeladden can never ever enter the Longhall again! He can't get round this one!
textByHashes.1b3c21a6e0229e53423f7f61b37ca4876bf3bf31: Ah... when I gave up my travels across the world many years back, to return to my expected role as longhall barkeep, as my mother, and her mother, were before me,
textByHashes.0cb49f7f1e54d447442f797f314eed4b518d7822: I gave up a lot of the freedom I had found in the outside world. I know it is our custom to shun outerlanders and their ways, but I didn't find them as bad as the stories say.
textByHashes.da7a30ecb427d498534aec19c93620c186c2b3e7: Sometimes I feel as though we Fremennik live in a prison that we have constructed for ourselves, and that WE are the outerlanders, out here on the edge of the world...
textByHashes.9acbcbf056e8e0b0fc4dc04bbdc96d73179b8977: I'm sorry, I think it is part of the job of Longhall barkeep to get philosophical about things ocassionally. I wish you all the best of luck with your trials, outerlander.
textByHashes.9424930202d74ac84b033a066ab994b6e002e0c4: When you have finished, perhaps you will come back here, and we can share a drink over tales of the outside world?
textByHashes.e285ff9a418787bbd1ca523672c22ef98d0a1980: Hello yourself, outerlander. A little out of the way up here, aren't you?
textByHashes.f195270b3de31eae1b8e7f08f08d32033fa9cfa0: I would love to stop and chat with you, but unfortunately we have a custom that no Fremennik may speak with the outerlanders without the permission of our chieftain.
textByHashes.84cf2e92200427c13cb53a902075929de906be9c: Don't take it personally. The Chieftain is stood just over there, his name is Brundt. I suggest you go and introduce yourself.
textByHashes.1c7a3e98c1d4f4476ef145f1bbbb4ad6b580294e: You wouldn't want to go making any enemies because you weren't aware of our customs now, would you?
textByHashes.a6bffcdc329ee09ac2f0a1763d22f54a72adcaba: Not a problem, outerlander. It's always nice to see a new face in the Longhall; it happens so rarely.
textByHashes.6ded206f562b52c612c3256d932819ae32dcba58: Hello again . I suppose you want a drink? Or are you going to try another scam with that terrible Askeladden again?
textByHashes.921be6a6528244a10b2daf9452ddcad4b18ba285: Yes. Yes I do. I should never have trusted him not to come in here, even with that written promise.
textByHashes.aa23c30abce4a564341d0937820d136ad60edd4d: Anyway, do you want a drink or not?
